description: Small/medium businesses served by managed service providers (5-500 employees). High posture variance across customers; MSP's job is to lift the bottom quartile.

citations.safe_score: IBM Cost of a Data Breach 2025 SMB section + Verizon DBIR 2025 small-business breakdown.
citations.open_critical: NVD CVE distribution against typical SMB vendor mix (SonicWall, FortiGate, Ubiquiti, Microsoft 365, Google Workspace). KEV active count.
citations.open_high: Same NVD/KEV intersection at HIGH severity.
citations.drift_events_per_week: Mandiant M-Trends 2025; SMB rate lower than enterprise because of fewer changes overall.
citations.mfa_coverage_pct: Microsoft Digital Defense Report 2025 + CompTIA State of Cybersecurity 2025.
citations.patch_lag_days: Qualys TruRisk 2025 SMB subsection + Datto State of MSP Report 2025.
citations.nhi_growth_rate_pct: CyberArk 2025; SMBs typical NHI growth driven by SaaS app sprawl.
